headline: Will BlackRock’s (BLK) New Nasdaq 100 ETF and Tokenization Push Redefine Its Core Narrative?
summary: Earlier this month, BlackRock outlined plans to launch the iShares Nasdaq 100 ETF (ticker: IQQ) on Nasdaq with an initial US$24 net asset value per share and a gross expense ratio of 0.12%, temporarily reduced to 0.10% through July 31, 2027, expanding its established US$41.00 billions global Nasdaq-100 toolkit. By pairing this ETF launch with rapid expansion of its blockchain-based BUIDL fund and participation in government-backed tokenization initiatives, BlackRock is deepening its role at...
